binding: {"model":"erc20_pool","notes":"POOL-LEVEL ONLY. Escrow/per-escrow lifecycle invariants are NOT modeled. Escrow-level properties (single settlement, signature verification, Axelar gateway gating, deadline-based refund) require an escrow-aware model extension.","functions":[{"name":"deposit","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["total_add_amt"]},{"name":"settleFromSource","guards":["amt_gt_0","total_ge_amt"],"effects":["total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"refund","guards":["total_ge_amt"],"effects":["total_sub_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_total"],"invariant_mapping":[{"english":"Total token balance held by the contract must never go negative.","invariant":"nonneg_total"},{"english":"Total held cannot exceed the practical supply cap.","invariant":"supply_cap"}],"coverage":{"checked":["deposit conservation (pool-level)","non-negative contract balance"],"not_checked":["escrow single-settlement","per-escrow spent ≤ deposit","Axelar gateway-only access","signature verification","deadline-based refund gating","paymentId uniqueness"],"recommendation":"Extend trusted core with an escrow_pool model that tracks per-escrow state (payer, payee, deposit, spent, settled, deadline) and escrow lifecycle invariants."}}

{"model":"erc20_pool","notes":"POOL-LEVEL ONLY. Channel/struct lifecycle invariants are NOT modeled here — the current vocabulary covers total contract token accounting. Channel-level properties (spent ≤ deposit, expiry gating, signature authorization, status transitions) require a channel-aware model extension.","functions":[{"name":"openChannel","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["total_add_amt"]},{"name":"closeChannel","guards":["amt_gt_0","total_ge_amt"],"effects":["total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"refundChannel","guards":["total_ge_amt"],"effects":["total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"extendChannel","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["total_add_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_total"],"invariant_mapping":[{"english":"Total token balance held by the contract must never go negative.","invariant":"nonneg_total"},{"english":"Total held cannot exceed the practical supply cap for any ERC-20.","invariant":"supply_cap"}],"coverage":{"checked":["deposit conservation (pool-level)","non-negative contract balance"],"not_checked":["channel status transitions","per-channel spent ≤ deposit","signature authorization in closeChannel","expiry gating on refundChannel","reentrancy safety (nonReentrant modifier)","payee-only close, payer-only refund"],"recommendation":"Extend trusted core with a channel_pool model that tracks per-channel state (deposit, spent, status, payer, payee, expiry) and channel lifecycle invariants."}}

{"model":"erc20_pool","notes":"POOL-LEVEL ONLY. Subscription lifecycle and per-period invariants are NOT modeled. Subscription-level properties (active→cancelled transition, completedPeriods ≤ maxPeriods, per-period spend limits, EIP-712 authorization, cancellation refund formula) require a subscription-aware model extension.","functions":[{"name":"createSubscription","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["total_add_amt"]},{"name":"renew","guards":["amt_gt_0","total_ge_amt"],"effects":["total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"cancel","guards":["total_ge_amt"],"effects":["total_sub_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_total"],"invariant_mapping":[{"english":"Total token balance held by the contract must never go negative.","invariant":"nonneg_total"},{"english":"Total held cannot exceed the practical supply cap.","invariant":"supply_cap"}],"coverage":{"checked":["deposit conservation (pool-level)","non-negative contract balance"],"not_checked":["subscription active→cancelled transition","completedPeriods ≤ maxPeriods","per-period spent ≤ amountPerPeriod","EIP-712 subscription signature verification","cancel refund formula correctness","totalDeposited tracking accuracy","reentrancy safety (nonReentrant modifier)"],"recommendation":"Extend trusted core with a subscription_pool model that tracks per-subscription state (payer, payee, amountPerPeriod, completedPeriods, maxPeriods, active, totalDeposited, totalSpent) and subscription lifecycle invariants."}}

{"model":"amm_pool","description":"Uniswap V2 pair — constant-product swap with reentrancy lock, add/remove liquidity, and swap-exact-input","functions":[{"name":"swap","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","reserveX_ge_dx","reserveY_ge_dy","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","reserveX_sub","reserveY_sub","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"swapExactInput","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","reserveY_ge_dy","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","reserveX_add","reserveY_sub","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"addLiquidity","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","not_locked"],"effects":["reserveX_add","reserveY_add","lp_mint_amt"]},{"name":"removeLiquidity","guards":["amt_gt_0","lp_ge_amt","reserveX_ge_dx","reserveY_ge_dy","not_locked"],"effects":["lp_burn_amt","reserveX_sub","reserveY_sub"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_reserves","nonneg_lp","lp_integrity","constant_product","reentrancy_safe"]}

{"model":"lending_pool","description":"Aave lending pool — deposit, collateral, borrow with health check, repay, withdraw, liquidate","functions":[{"name":"deposit","guards":["amt_gt_0","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","bal_add_amt","total_add_amt","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"depositCollateral","guards":["amt_gt_0","bal_ge_amt","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","bal_sub_amt","collateral_add","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"borrow","guards":["amt_gt_0","healthy_position","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","debt_add","bal_add_amt","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"repay","guards":["amt_gt_0","debt_ge_amt","bal_ge_amt","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","debt_sub","bal_sub_amt","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"withdrawCollateral","guards":["amt_gt_0","collateral_ge_amt","healthy_position","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","collateral_sub","bal_add_amt","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"liquidate","guards":["amt_gt_0","collateral_ge_amt","debt_ge_amt","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","collateral_sub","debt_sub","reentrancy_lock_release"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_balance","nonneg_total","nonneg_collateral","nonneg_debt","nonneg_total_collateral","nonneg_total_debt","collateral_integrity","debt_integrity","overcollateralized","reentrancy_safe"]}

{"model":"lending_pool","description":"Compound cToken — mint/redeem/borrow/repay with exchange rate tracking. accrueInterest ensures exchange rate only increases (modeled as no-op in binding since rate is not tracked).","functions":[{"name":"mint","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["bal_add_amt","total_add_amt","collateral_add"]},{"name":"redeem","guards":["amt_gt_0","collateral_ge_amt","total_ge_amt"],"effects":["collateral_sub","bal_sub_amt","total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"borrow","guards":["amt_gt_0","healthy_position"],"effects":["debt_add","bal_add_amt"]},{"name":"repay","guards":["amt_gt_0","debt_ge_amt","bal_ge_amt"],"effects":["debt_sub","bal_sub_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_balance","nonneg_total","nonneg_collateral","nonneg_debt","nonneg_total_collateral","nonneg_total_debt","collateral_integrity","debt_integrity","overcollateralized","solvency"]}

{"model":"amm_pool","description":"Safe oracle: checks TWAP staleness and minimum price before swap","functions":[{"name":"swap","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","twap_stale","price_ge_min","reserveX_ge_dx","reserveY_ge_dy"],"effects":["reserveX_add","reserveY_sub","price_update"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_price","oracle_integrity","price_stability"]}

{"model":"amm_pool","description":"Exploit: attacker manipulates oracle price before swap, violating oracle_integrity","functions":[{"name":"manipulate","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["oracle_manipulate"]},{"name":"swap","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","price_valid","reserveX_ge_dx","reserveY_ge_dy"],"effects":["reserveX_add","reserveY_sub","price_update"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_price","oracle_integrity"]}

{"model":"erc20_pool","description":"Governance contract with enforced timelock before proposal execution","functions":[{"name":"propose","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["proposal_execute"]},{"name":"execute","guards":["amt_gt_0","timelock_expired"],"effects":["bal_add_amt","total_add_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_balance","solvency","nonneg_timelock"]}

{"model":"erc20_pool","description":"Exploit: governance missing timelock — execute mints unbacked balance without delay","functions":[{"name":"propose","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["proposal_execute"]},{"name":"execute","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["bal_add_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_balance","solvency","nonneg_timelock"]}

{"model":"lending_pool","description":"Compound cToken — mint/redeem for cToken collateral (1:1 with underlying at initial exchange rate), borrow/repay for debt with healthy_position guard. Borrow pulls underlying from pool (total_sub_amt), repay returns it (total_add_amt).","functions":[{"name":"mint","guards":["amt_gt_0"],"effects":["total_add_amt","collateral_add"]},{"name":"redeem","guards":["amt_gt_0","collateral_ge_amt","total_ge_amt"],"effects":["collateral_sub","total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"borrow","guards":["amt_gt_0","healthy_position","total_ge_amt"],"effects":["debt_add","bal_add_amt","total_sub_amt"]},{"name":"repay","guards":["amt_gt_0","debt_ge_amt","bal_ge_amt"],"effects":["debt_sub","bal_sub_amt","total_add_amt"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_balance","nonneg_total","nonneg_collateral","nonneg_debt","nonneg_total_collateral","nonneg_total_debt","collateral_integrity","debt_integrity","overcollateralized"]}

{"model":"amm_pool","description":"Curve StableSwap — simplified stablecoin AMM. exchange adds to one reserve and subtracts from another (constant-sum-like vs constant-product). constant_product is expected to be violated for exchange functions since stable swaps trade near peg with low slippage.","functions":[{"name":"exchange0to1","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","reserveY_ge_dy","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","reserveX_add","reserveY_sub","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"exchange1to0","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","reserveX_ge_dx","not_locked"],"effects":["reentrancy_lock_acquire","reserveX_sub","reserveY_add","reentrancy_lock_release"]},{"name":"addLiquidity","guards":["amt_gt_0","dy_gt_0","not_locked"],"effects":["reserveX_add","reserveY_add","lp_mint_amt"]},{"name":"removeLiquidity","guards":["amt_gt_0","lp_ge_amt","reserveX_ge_dx","reserveY_ge_dy","not_locked"],"effects":["lp_burn_amt","reserveX_sub","reserveY_sub"]}],"invariants":["nonneg_reserves","nonneg_lp","lp_integrity","reentrancy_safe","constant_product","backing_amm"]}
